page_content:
THET228 Special Topics in Introductory Theatre and Performance (1-3 Credits)

This course is offered as part of the TDPS Artist-in-Residence program. Topics covered may include: Intercultural Theatre; Performance Art; Puppetry; Solo Performance; or Theatrical Design.

Prerequisite: TDPS201, THET116, THET222, and THET223; and permission of ARHU-School of Theatre, Dance & Performance Studies department.

Repeatable to: 3 credits if content differs.
